message:
fix(node): eliminate remaining hash collision sites in verifier_sdk, profile_tuning_harness, and benchmark_suite

Replace serde_json unwrap_or_default() with unwrap_or_else error-tagged strings
before SHA-256 hashing to prevent hash collisions when serialization fails (e.g. NaN floats).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
